name: carousel-demo
visual_summary: The carousel-demo is a responsive visual showcase that displays multiple items in a circular or slide style layout, typically used for advertising, showcasing a series of images or content, or providing easy navigation between multiple features or offers. It can be customized for various use cases and applications, making it a popular choice for developers. It is most suitable when multiple options need to be presented in an engaging and interactive manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: carousel-demo
Description: The carousel-demo is a responsive visual showcase that displays multiple items in a circular or slide style layout, typically used for advertising, showcasing a series of images or content, or providing easy navigation between multiple features or offers. It can be customized for various use cases and applications, making it a popular choice for developers. It is most suitable when multiple options need to be presented in an engaging and interactive manner.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. animated, hover, clickable
Tags: carousel, slider, responsive, image, advertising, showcase, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
